name: @tca-timer/shared
description: Shared logic consumed by the TCA Timer desktop overlay, judge SPA, and Fastify backend. Two entry points: the top-level barrel (`@tca-timer/shared`) for timer/format helpers used everywhere, and `@tca-timer/shared/api` for the REST contract (zod schemas + types) used by the SPA and the server. Splitting them keeps zod out of the Tauri overlay bundle.
